form.formComment: Drawn the inside alley. Most recently finished 7th in a Mix 3/4 on April 14 over 410m at Horsham behind Paw Palmer beaten 8 lengths (23.56). Well placed and among the chances here.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.47) when fifth over 400m at this track in a Grade 5. Has two wins and three placings from 10 starts from the draw. Makes strong appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick top begin; Quick to begin and raced wide on home turn.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 400m at this track behind Oddly Cool beaten 5 lengths (23.30). Capable of playing a big role.

form.formComment: Was a winner three back at Sale then finished in the minors before missing the frame last time when seventh (30.28) at Sandown. Has ability but needs to find best and others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.61) when sixth over 400m at this track in a Grade 5. Goes very well off the draw boasting four wins and three places from nine starts. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.
